_comment: Golden regression suite (Appendix M, 'Regression Test Suite'). 50 labelled cases. The classifier must get at most 3 wrong on recoverability before an instruction/prompt change is allowed to ship.

cases.comment: I love these meals but money is really tight right now, can't afford it this month. Hope to be back!
Great food, just need to cut back on spending until my finances recover.
Between jobs at the moment so I have to watch my budget. Loved the organic ingredients.
Money's tight after some unexpected bills, but the recipes were wonderful.
Started a new job with crazy hours and have no time to cook. The meals were delicious.
My schedule got really hectic this semester, just too busy to keep up. Great variety.
New shift means I'm never home for dinner. I really enjoyed the recipes.
Recovering from surgery and my doctor changed my diet for now. Loved the quality.
Going through a medical treatment and can't manage cooking right now. Great food.
Traveling for work for the next two months so I have to pause. The meals were fantastic.
On the road for a long business trip, won't be home to cook. Really enjoyed it.
Just had a baby and life is chaos right now, need to simplify. Loved the recipes.
Expecting a newborn soon and need to scale back for now. The meals were great.
Moving to a new city next month and not sure about delivery there. The food was delicious.
Relocating for work, changing address soon. Really enjoyed the ingredients.
Going through some personal stuff and need to step back for now. Loved the meals.
Family circumstances mean I have to pause temporarily. The food was wonderful.
I'll resubscribe once my work travel wraps up, the variety was the best part.
Just need a short break while I recover from an injury, will come back.
Cash is tight this quarter, otherwise I'd keep the subscription. Loved it.
Way too expensive for what you get. Not worth it.
The recipes got really repetitive and boring after a while.
Portions were small and the seasoning was bland. Disappointed.
Overpriced compared to just buying groceries myself.
Quality went downhill and I'm done with it. Never again.
Too many ingredients to prep, more work than it's worth.
Found a cheaper service that I like better.
The meals just weren't very tasty. Cancelling for good.
Packaging waste was excessive and it's not worth the price.
Honestly just not impressed with the food quality.
The recipes were always the same and pretty bland overall.
Delivery was late twice and the food quality was poor.
Just too pricey and the portions never filled us up.
Not enough vegetarian options and what there was tasted awful.
I switched to a competitor with better recipes.
The food was fine but nothing special and overpriced.
Recipes too complicated and the results were disappointing.
Honestly disappointed with the whole experience, cancelling.
Moving on, the food just got worse and isn't worth it anymore.
I'm done, the meals were bland and the quality dropped.
